svg.title: High-level AWS architecture for a stateful multi-turn conversational assistant
svg.desc: Five-layer architecture: Client connects to API Gateway via WebSocket, routes to Lambda orchestrator which applies the memory strategy, reads and writes ElastiCache and DynamoDB, invokes Amazon Bedrock with streaming, and emits token metrics to CloudWatch.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the client layer look like for a stateful chat app on AWS?')
sendPrompt('Why use WebSocket API Gateway for a conversational assistant on AWS?')
sendPrompt('What memory strategy logic lives inside the Lambda orchestrator?')
sendPrompt('How does ElastiCache support sliding window and token budget memory strategies?')
sendPrompt('What DynamoDB schema works best for storing pinned user facts in a chat app?')
sendPrompt('What CloudWatch metrics should I track for Bedrock token costs and context window usage?')
sendPrompt('How does invoke_model_with_response_stream work for Claude on Amazon Bedrock?')
